# Ilya Klishin Fact-Based Digest

Primary index page:
https://ilyaklishin-eng.github.io/Playground/insights/index.html

Static archive:
https://ilyaklishin-eng.github.io/Playground/insights/posts/index.html

Sitemap:
https://ilyaklishin-eng.github.io/Playground/insights/sitemap.xml

Policy:
- Fact-based summaries only
- Short quote snippets
- Link to original publication in every item
- No reposting of full texts
